testcase.classname: Performance & Scalability Tests should handle a high volume of concurrent API requests without performance degradation
testcase.name: Performance & Scalability Tests should handle a high volume of concurrent API requests without performance degradation

testcase.classname: Performance & Scalability Tests should maintain API response times below a defined threshold under load
testcase.name: Performance & Scalability Tests should maintain API response times below a defined threshold under load

testcase.classname: Performance & Scalability Tests should efficiently process large volumes of financial data
testcase.name: Performance & Scalability Tests should efficiently process large volumes of financial data

testcase.classname: API Endpoint & Integration Testing GET /api/config/theme - should return the correct Sovereign Ledger color palette
testcase.name: API Endpoint & Integration Testing GET /api/config/theme - should return the correct Sovereign Ledger color palette

testcase.classname: API Endpoint & Integration Testing POST /submit - should reject unauthenticated requests
testcase.name: API Endpoint & Integration Testing POST /submit - should reject unauthenticated requests

testcase.classname: API Endpoint & Integration Testing POST /submit - should reject invalid data with a Zod error message
testcase.name: API Endpoint & Integration Testing POST /submit - should reject invalid data with a Zod error message

testcase.classname: API Endpoint & Integration Testing POST /submit - should accept valid data and start async processing
testcase.name: API Endpoint & Integration Testing POST /submit - should accept valid data and start async processing

testcase.classname: API Endpoint & Integration Testing GET /status & /data - should correctly report the lifecycle of a verification
testcase.name: API Endpoint & Integration Testing GET /status & /data - should correctly report the lifecycle of a verification

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Simple Data Types (Structured) should return a string from /string
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Simple Data Types (Structured) should return a string from /string

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Simple Data Types (Structured) should return a number from /number
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Simple Data Types (Structured) should return a number from /number

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Simple Data Types (Structured) should return a boolean from /boolean
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Simple Data Types (Structured) should return a boolean from /boolean

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Simple Structures (Structured) should return an array from /array
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Simple Structures (Structured) should return an array from /array

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Simple Structures (Structured) should return an object from /object
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Simple Structures (Structured) should return an object from /object

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Nested/Complex Structures (Structured) should accept a valid nested object
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Nested/Complex Structures (Structured) should accept a valid nested object

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Nested/Complex Structures (Structured) should reject an invalid nested object
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Nested/Complex Structures (Structured) should reject an invalid nested object

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should get an item by ID
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should get an item by ID

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should return 404 for a non-existent item
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should return 404 for a non-existent item

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should search for items by tag
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should search for items by tag

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should return an error if tag is missing
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Path and Query Parameters should return an error if tag is missing

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Data Modification should update an item
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Data Modification should update an item

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Data Modification should delete an item
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Data Modification should delete an item

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should accept a valid semi-structured event
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should accept a valid semi-structured event

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should reject an event with a missing eventName
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should reject an event with a missing eventName

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should accept a valid unstructured text log
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should accept a valid unstructured text log

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should reject an empty text log
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should reject an empty text log

testcase.classname: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should reject a non-string log
testcase.name: Sample Data APIs Semi-structured and Unstructured Data should reject a non-string log

testcase.classname: User Account Management should allow a user to create their own account
testcase.name: User Account Management should allow a user to create their own account

testcase.classname: User Account Management should not allow a user to create an account for someone else
testcase.name: User Account Management should not allow a user to create an account for someone else

testcase.classname: User Account Management should allow a user to read their own account
testcase.name: User Account Management should allow a user to read their own account

testcase.classname: User Account Management should not allow a user to read another user's account
testcase.name: User Account Management should not allow a user to read another user's account

testcase.classname: User Account Management should allow a user to update their own account
testcase.name: User Account Management should allow a user to update their own account

testcase.classname: User Account Management should not allow a user to update another user's account
testcase.name: User Account Management should not allow a user to update another user's account

testcase.classname: User Account Management should allow a user to delete their own account
testcase.name: User Account Management should allow a user to delete their own account

testcase.classname: User Account Management should not allow a user to delete another user's account
testcase.name: User Account Management should not allow a user to delete another user's account

testcase.classname: Unstructured Log Ingestion should accept and process a plain text log payload
testcase.name: Unstructured Log Ingestion should accept and process a plain text log payload

testcase.classname: API Authentication & Authorization should allow a user to read their own data
testcase.name: API Authentication & Authorization should allow a user to read their own data

testcase.classname: API Authentication & Authorization should prevent a user from reading other users` data
testcase.name: API Authentication & Authorization should prevent a user from reading other users` data

testcase.classname: API Authentication & Authorization should allow any authenticated user to read from the data collection
testcase.name: API Authentication & Authorization should allow any authenticated user to read from the data collection

testcase.classname: API Authentication & Authorization should prevent unauthenticated users from reading anything
testcase.name: API Authentication & Authorization should prevent unauthenticated users from reading anything

testcase.classname: API Authentication & Authorization should allow editors to write to the data collection
testcase.name: API Authentication & Authorization should allow editors to write to the data collection

testcase.classname: API Authentication & Authorization should prevent non-editors from writing to the data collection
testcase.name: API Authentication & Authorization should prevent non-editors from writing to the data collection

testcase.classname: CSV Data Ingestion should accept and process a valid CSV payload
testcase.name: CSV Data Ingestion should accept and process a valid CSV payload

testcase.classname: UI Theme & Design Consistency should serve the correct color palette defined in design.md
testcase.name: UI Theme & Design Consistency should serve the correct color palette defined in design.md

testcase.classname: UI Theme & Design Consistency should provide valid contrast ratios for accessible text
testcase.name: UI Theme & Design Consistency should provide valid contrast ratios for accessible text

testcase.classname: API Endpoint Tests GET /api/health should return 200 OK
testcase.name: API Endpoint Tests GET /api/health should return 200 OK

testcase.classname: API Endpoint Tests POST /api/data should handle invalid data submission with a 400 error
testcase.name: API Endpoint Tests POST /api/data should handle invalid data submission with a 400 error

testcase.classname: API Endpoint Tests should create a new user with valid data
testcase.name: API Endpoint Tests should create a new user with valid data

testcase.classname: API Endpoint Tests should fail to create a new user with invalid data
testcase.name: API Endpoint Tests should fail to create a new user with invalid data

testcase.classname: API Endpoint Tests should log in a user with correct credentials
testcase.name: API Endpoint Tests should log in a user with correct credentials

testcase.classname: API Endpoint Tests should fail to log in a user with incorrect credentials
testcase.name: API Endpoint Tests should fail to log in a user with incorrect credentials

testcase.classname: Data Analysis Flows should correctly identify outliers more than 2 std deviations from the mean
testcase.name: Data Analysis Flows should correctly identify outliers more than 2 std deviations from the mean

testcase.classname: Data Analysis Flows should return an empty result when no data is present
testcase.name: Data Analysis Flows should return an empty result when no data is present

testcase.classname: Financial Data Ingestion should connect to Stripe and fetch data successfully
testcase.name: Financial Data Ingestion should connect to Stripe and fetch data successfully

testcase.classname: Financial Data Ingestion should handle different data formats from Stripe
testcase.name: Financial Data Ingestion should handle different data formats from Stripe

testcase.classname: Financial Data Ingestion should handle API errors gracefully
testcase.name: Financial Data Ingestion should handle API errors gracefully

testcase.classname: Financial Data Ingestion should handle empty data from Stripe
testcase.name: Financial Data Ingestion should handle empty data from Stripe

testsuite.name: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification

testcase.classname: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should produce consistent and predictable outputs for the same inputs (Golden Dataset)
testcase.name: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should produce consistent and predictable outputs for the same inputs (Golden Dataset)

testcase.classname: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should gracefully handle incomplete or noisy data
testcase.name: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should gracefully handle incomplete or noisy data

testcase.classname: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should throw a clear error for invalid data types
testcase.name: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should throw a clear error for invalid data types

testcase.classname: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should ensure demographic neutrality in financial predictions
testcase.name: AI Processing Phase: Core Model Verification should ensure demographic neutrality in financial predictions

testcase.classname: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Golden Dataset Testing should produce accurate financial metrics that match the golden dataset
testcase.name: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Golden Dataset Testing should produce accurate financial metrics that match the golden dataset

testcase.classname: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Bias Testing should show no statistical bias across different data segments
testcase.name: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Bias Testing should show no statistical bias across different data segments

testcase.classname: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Noisy Data Handling should gracefully handle and report on incomplete or noisy financial data
testcase.name: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Noisy Data Handling should gracefully handle and report on incomplete or noisy financial data

testcase.classname: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Financial Data Ingestion Formatting should correctly parse different date formats
testcase.name: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Financial Data Ingestion Formatting should correctly parse different date formats

testcase.classname: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Financial Data Ingestion Formatting should correctly interpret different currency symbols and formats
testcase.name: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Financial Data Ingestion Formatting should correctly interpret different currency symbols and formats

testcase.classname: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Financial Data Ingestion Formatting should pass with valid currency and date formats
testcase.name: AI Model & Data Verification Tests Financial Data Ingestion Formatting should pass with valid currency and date formats

testcase.classname: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should accept a valid JSON payload
testcase.name: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should accept a valid JSON payload

testcase.classname: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should return a 400 Bad Request if mandatory fields are missing
testcase.name: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should return a 400 Bad Request if mandatory fields are missing

testcase.classname: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should strip malicious scripts (XSS) from input strings
testcase.name: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should strip malicious scripts (XSS) from input strings

testcase.classname: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should successfully validate a correct color palette schema
testcase.name: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should successfully validate a correct color palette schema

testcase.classname: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should reject a payload with an invalid hex code in the theme
testcase.name: Data Ingestion Phase: Validation & Sanitization should reject a payload with an invalid hex code in the theme

testcase.classname: Security Tests should prevent SQL injection attacks
testcase.name: Security Tests should prevent SQL injection attacks

testcase.classname: Security Tests should prevent cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks
testcase.name: Security Tests should prevent cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks

testcase.classname: Security Tests should ensure sensitive data is encrypted at rest
testcase.name: Security Tests should ensure sensitive data is encrypted at rest

testcase.classname: Security Tests should ensure sensitive data is encrypted in transit
testcase.name: Security Tests should ensure sensitive data is encrypted in transit

testcase.classname: Security Tests should have hooks for automated penetration testing tools
testcase.name: Security Tests should have hooks for automated penetration testing tools
